pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-007 (TF, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4254 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.425, dcwf=0.410, nice=0.399) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: TF domain KSA TF-S-007 excluded at composite 0.4254, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4254 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4254 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a TF (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Quantitative Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. TF KSA with composite 0.4254 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-S-007 (TF, composite 0.4254) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4254 with signal across ddat=0.425, dcwf=0.410, nice=0.399 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from TF-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4254, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
